derive.title: Collections browser
derive.detail: Select a manifest entry to resolve its shell preview before mounting.

derive.title: Resolved selection
derive.detail: The selected manifest does not satisfy the canonical Collections selection rules.

derive.title: Resolved selection
derive.detail: This manifest is already mounted. Selection remains distinct from mounting.

derive.title: Resolved selection
derive.detail: Manifest metadata has been resolved. Mount still requires explicit user confirmation.

guardrails: Selection and mounting remain distinct steps.
Resolved-but-not-mounted is a transitional display state inside Collections mode, not a new mode.
Reading manifest descriptors is cheap and reversible; mounting is explicit because it changes shell state.
Collections browser resolution does not change save or export boundaries.
